settings.title: Organization Settings
settings.description: Manage your organization details and meeting defaults

orgDetails.title: Organization Details
orgDetails.name: Organization name
orgDetails.typeNote: Set during registration and cannot be changed

meetingDefaults.title: Meeting Defaults
meetingDefaults.description: Default settings for new meeting series in your organization

language.title: Organization Language
language.description: AI-generated content (summaries, nudges, suggestions) will use this language
language.label: Preferred language

theme.title: Color Theme
theme.description: Choose an accent color theme for your organization. All members will see this theme applied across the dashboard and charts.

aiContext.title: Internal Manifesto
aiContext.description: Help the AI understand your company. This context is included in every session analysis to produce more relevant summaries and coaching suggestions.
aiContext.label: Company manifesto
aiContext.placeholder: Describe your company culture, values, direction, and any context that would help the AI better understand your organization...

auditLog.title: Audit Log
auditLog.description: View all administrative actions in your organization
auditLog.retentionDesc: Audit logs are retained for 730 days per your organization's current configuration. For compliance exports exceeding this window, please contact the Support Team.
